testcase.classname: useHomeViewModel discovery filters shows error when from date is in the past

testcase.classname: useHomeViewModel discovery filters shows error when to date is earlier than from date

testcase.classname: useHomeViewModel discovery filters keeps the applied sort order during load more and silent refresh

testcase.classname: useHomeViewModel location picker opens and closes location modal
testcase.name: useHomeViewModel location picker opens and closes location modal

testcase.classname: useHomeViewModel location picker does not apply selected location immediately after choosing a suggestion
testcase.name: useHomeViewModel location picker does not apply selected location immediately after choosing a suggestion

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when event has no gender or age constraints
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when event has no gender or age constraints

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when preferred_gender is set but user gender is missing
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when preferred_gender is set but user gender is missing

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when preferred_gender is set but user gender is blank or whitespace
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when preferred_gender is set but user gender is blank or whitespace

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when user matches (lowercase or API uppercase wire format)
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when user matches (lowercase or API uppercase wire format)

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns a message when user gender does not match preferred_gender
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns a message when user gender does not match preferred_gender

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when minimum_age is set but birth_date is missing or blank
testcase.name: resolveConstraintViolation returns null when minimum_age is set but birth_date is missing or blank

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation returns a message when user is under minimum_age

testcase.classname: resolveConstraintViolation joins gender and age messages with · when both fail

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is false when approved count is below capacity
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is false when approved count is below capacity

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is true when approved count meets capacity
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is true when approved count meets capacity

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is false when capacity is null (unlimited)
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel isQuotaFull is false when capacity is null (unlimited)

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite calls removeFavorite and decrements count when currently favorited
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite calls removeFavorite and decrements count when currently favorited

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite calls addFavorite and increments count when currently not favorited
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite calls addFavorite and increments count when currently not favorited

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite rolls back optimistic favorite change when API fails
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleToggleFavorite rolls back optimistic favorite change when API fails

testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleRequestJoin calls requestJoinEvent with the message and updates status to PENDING

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel handleRequestJoin sends null message when the input is blank
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleRequestJoin sends null message when the input is blank

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel handleRequestJoin trims whitespace-only message and sends null
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel handleRequestJoin trims whitespace-only message and sends null

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when the event has no constraints
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when the event has no constraints

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when user gender is unknown (null) even if event has preferred_gender
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when user gender is unknown (null) even if event has preferred_gender

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when user gender matches preferred_gender (case-insensitive)
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when user gender matches preferred_gender (case-insensitive)

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when session UserSummary.gender is uppercase MALE (API wire format)
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when session UserSummary.gender is uppercase MALE (API wire format)

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is non-null when user gender does not match preferred_gender
testcase.name: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is non-null when user gender does not match preferred_gender

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation is null when user birth_date is unknown even if event has minimum_age

testcase.classname: useEventDetailViewModel constraintViolation combines both gender and age violations into one message
